news.headline: 70 credit unions linked with fintech operator now under Metallicus ownership.
news.summary: In recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest level in the past 10 years. This positive trend is attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs last month alone. Moreover, the GDP growth for the last quarter was recorded at 5.6%, showing a substantial increase compared to the previous year. Analysts predict that this economic growth is likely to continue in the upcoming months, indicating a promising outlook for the country's economy.

news.headline: Vitalic launches platform for geriatric mental health, lowering costs and better serving patients.
news.summary: Studies show that mental health plays a significant role in the health decline of the elderly, despite it often being ignored. Vitalic has introduced a unique practice platform and innovative engagement approach to improve care for geriatric patients. This not only enhances overall well-being but also lowers the total cost of care. The initiative was launched in Boston in December, focusing on catering to the special needs of older individuals.

news.headline: Econse Water Technologies celebrates 3 years of helping AtlantiCann Medical Inc. manage their greenhouse wastewater. Located in Nova Scotia, AMI brought in Econse to meet local regulations and prepare for growth.
news.summary: A prominent cultivator in the industry enlisted the services of Econse Water Technologies in Lockport, New York on Dec. 20, 2024 to comply with local wastewater regulations and facilitate future expansion. AtlantiCann Medical Inc. (AMI), based in Nova Scotia, Canada, took this step to ensure sustainable growth in their operations.

news.headline: Share buyback program transactions and those outside a liquidity contract were announced today.
Analysts predict a substantial increase in Ether ETFs by 2025.
news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, a significant decrease from the previous 5.2%. Additionally, the economy added a remarkable 250,000 new jobs in the past month, showing substantial growth in the labor market. This positive trend has boosted consumer confidence, resulting in a 3% increase in retail sales compared to last quarter. Experts anticipate continued economic improvement in the upcoming months, with projections suggesting a further decrease in the unemployment rate and a steady rise in job creation.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Solana, Binance Coin, Dogecoin, Cardano, Avalanche, Chainlink, and TON prices analyzed on 12/20 amidst bullish signs.
news.summary: The recent surge in Bitcoin's price indicates that investors remain optimistic about both BTC and alternative cryptocurrencies, as they persistently purchase during price drops beneath critical support levels.

news.headline: Dow Jones surges as inflation eases and Speaker Johnson eyes bill split to avoid shutdown; Warren Buffett increases top holding.
news.summary: The stock market received a boost as inflation showed signs of easing. Today, the Dow Jones surged amidst Speaker Johnson's plan to divide a bill to prevent a government shutdown. Meanwhile, Warren Buffett increased his stake in a top holding.

news.headline: Databook named Cool Vendor in Gartner®'s 2024 Cool Vendors™ in AI-Led Sales, highlights innovation in sales research.
PitchBook's 2025 Outlooks reveal key investment trends in private markets; includes over 40 outlooks from global research team.
news.summary: In Seattle, PitchBook, a top data provider for private and public equity markets, has unveiled its 2025 Outlooks. These reports delve into investment trends expected to shape the upcoming year, covering venture capital, private equity, healthcare, and key technology sectors. The comprehensive set includes over 40 outlooks from PitchBook's global research team, making it the most expansive forecast offered to date. This release follows a year of economic uncertainty, offering valuable insights for investors and industry professionals.

news.headline: Mid-year update: revealing key figures and stats.
Evolution of technology offers smart devices for home, office, and on-the-go; providing convenience and connectivity for the entire family.
news.summary: In Mission, Kansas on December 20, 2024, an article highlighted the evolution of technology and the challenge of keeping up with the latest devices. This includes a wide range of smart gadgets such as PCs, smart wearables, earbuds, smartphones, and mixed reality devices. These technologies are continuously advancing, making it essential for individuals to stay informed about the newest trends. Stay updated on the innovative products available for your home, office, and when you're on the go. Remember, technology is always changing, so be sure to explore the latest offerings in the market.

news.headline: President Mnangagwa meets with Zambia's former VP to support Zambian candidate Sam Maimbo for AfDB.
news.summary: Zimbabwean President Mnangagwa, also serving as SADC Chairperson, reiterated his nation's and SADC's strong backing for Zambian candidate Sam Maimbo. This announcement was made in Lusaka, Zambia on December 20, 2024. In a statement issued by Special Envoy Kavindele after the meeting, he expressed his joy at the development.

news.headline: Nasdaq surged 300 points, Dow up 1.82% to 43,111.11, NASDAQ rose 1.77% to 19,714.27, S&P 500 gained 1.76% to 5,970.36.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw a rise in trading activity, with the Nasdaq Composite surging by over 300 points on Friday. The Dow climbed by 1.82% to 43,111.11, the NASDAQ increased by 1.77% to 19,714.27, and the S&P 500 went up by 1.76% to 5,970.36. Real estate sector shares spiked by 2.6%, while consumer staples shares only rose by 0.6%. The U.S. personal consumption expenditures price index grew by 0.1% month-over-month in November, falling from the previous two months' 0.2% and below market expectations of 0.2%. Humacyte, Inc. (NASDAQ:HUMA) saw its shares surge by 40% to $4.8500 following FDA approval for SYMVESS to treat extremity vascular injuries. HC Wainwright & Co. also lifted its price target on the stock from $12 to $15. Personalis, Inc. (NASDAQ:PSNL) experienced a boost in its shares.

news.headline: Boston Scientific revises Polarx & Polarx FIT cryoablation balloon catheter guidelines due to serious injuries. 7 esophageal injuries reported, along with 4 deaths. - Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) recently modified the guidelines for using its Polarx and Polarx FIT cryoablation balloon catheters after incidents of serious harm, including seven cases of esophageal damage and four fatalities. This decision stems from a notable increase in reports of esophageal injury, particularly atrio-esophageal fistula, following catheter ablation procedures for atrial fibrillation. The company is revising the use instructions for POLARx Cryoablation Balloon Catheters to address the heightened risk of atrio-esophageal fistula and recommended practices. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Balmoral Funds LLC affiliate buys R.H. Sheppard Co., leading truck steering provider, from Bendix for undisclosed sum.
news.summary: In Hanover, Pennsylvania, an affiliate of Balmoral Funds LLC has completed the acquisition of R.H. Sheppard Co., Inc., a top supplier of steering technologies for Class 5-8 trucks in North America. The purchase was made from Bendix Commercial Vehicle Systems LLC, a subsidiary of Knorr-Bremse. The deal includes all aspects of Sheppard's business such as branded products, production equipment, sales operations, and intellectual property. Knorr-Bremse's ISIN is DE000KBX1006, and its ticker symbol is KBX.

news.headline: AI-powered Leap Financial raises $3.5 million seed round led by Fuel Venture Capital and Ascendo Venture Capital.
news.summary: Leap Financial, a fintech startup based in Miami, has successfully raised $3.5 million in seed funding. This investment round was led by Fuel Venture Capital, with additional funding coming from Ascendo Venture Capital. The company offers services that enable both financial and non-financial institutions to engage in cross-border money transfers, streamlining the process and aiding immigrants in sending money to their home countries. Leap's focus lies in embedded remittances and payments, providing enhanced engagement through AI technology.

news.headline: The Drive Awards 2024 reveal best cars in six categories, recognizing innovation and excitement in the automotive industry.
news.summary: Los Angeles, Dec. 20, 2024 - The Drive has revealed the 2024 recipients of its yearly awards, highlighting the top cars across six categories. The Drive Awards celebrate outstanding automotive achievements by acknowledging the most thrilling and cutting-edge vehicles that were introduced or underwent significant innovations during the year.

news.headline: St. Maarten's Vie L'Ven unveils new sports landmark with 2 pickleball, 2 tennis courts & padel court, along with limited-edition paddle.
news.summary: A special event was held to commemorate the unveiling of St. Maarten's inaugural elevated sports complex. This state-of-the-art facility boasts two pickleball courts, two tennis courts, and a padel court. To mark this occasion, Vie L'Ven introduced a unique pickleball paddle created in collaboration with Helios, capturing the essence of the island's dynamic culture. The announcement took place in Toronto on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Varo Bank partners with Green Dot, offering zero-fee cash deposits at 7,500+ CVS locations nationwide.
news.summary: Varo Bank, the pioneering all-digital bank in the U.S., has recently partnered with Green Dot Corporation to facilitate cash deposits at more than 7,500 CVS Pharmacy locations. This collaboration, effective as of December 20, 2024, will provide Varo Bank customers with increased convenience and accessibility.

news.headline: 'Ragnarok: Landverse' from Ragnarok Online expanding to Ethereum Gaming Network Ronin with Pixels and Axie Infinity.
news.summary: Ragnarok: Landverse, a crypto game inspired by the popular Ragnarok Online, is set to make its debut on the Ronin network. This new game will be joining other well-known titles such as Pixels and Axie Infinity on this platform. The game aims to offer a unique experience to players who are fans of the classic Ragnarok Online universe. By launching on Ronin, Ragnarok: Landverse will have access to a growing community of players and enthusiasts, contributing to its potential success in the crypto gaming market.

news.headline: Washington Trust Bancorp announces balance sheet repositioning to support growth. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Westerly, Rhode Island, Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: WASH) disclosed Bank balance sheet repositioning moves to back ongoing organic growth. The Corporation, which functions as the parent company of The Washington Trust Company situated in Westerly, made this announcement.

news.headline: Dr. Berrien Moore III, a renowned Earth Science leader and USRA trustee, passes away. (Total characters: 101)
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, the Universities Space Research Association (USRA) sadly announced the passing of Dr. Berrien Moore III, a renowned figure in Earth Science and a cherished member of the USRA Board of Trustees. Dr. Moore’s contributions have been instrumental in the field, and his loss will be felt deeply.

news.headline: PBF Energy (NYSE:PBF) will announce Q4 2024 earnings on Feb 13, 2025 in Parsippany, NJ. Details to be shared via call.
news.summary: Parsippany, New Jersey - PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE:PBF) revealed its plans to unveil the earnings report for Q4 2024 on February 13, 2025. The company is set to conduct a conference call and webcast to delve into the results and discuss pertinent business issues.

news.headline: Influencer Hawk Tuah addresses rug pull allegations involving a memecoin that surged to $500M market cap before plummeting 90%.
news.summary: A new memecoin featuring the image of Hailey Welch surged to a market value of about $500 million following its debut on December 4, only to subsequently plummet by 90%.

news.headline: Gateway Fiber connects first home internet customers in Northampton, MA, expanding access in underserved communities.
news.summary: Gateway Fiber, a high-speed internet provider based in NORTHAMPTON, Mass, recently connected its initial Northampton home internet customers, symbolizing a major advancement in enhancing dependable, high-speed internet availability in western MA and other underserved regions. The company expressed excitement in including Northampton within their network and introducing their first home internet customer in the area to the benefits of truly high-speed internet. This milestone highlights their commitment to bridging connectivity gaps, with plans to extend these services to more households.

news.headline: Largest strike against Amazon in American history by Teamsters for fair treatment, gaining momentum.
news.summary: Thousands of Teamsters are gaining momentum in their fight for fair treatment in Washington. On December 19, they initiated the biggest strike against Amazon in US history due to the company's refusal to comply with the law and negotiate a union contract. The scale of the strike highlights the significant impact of this action.

news.headline: PLSV notified of trade by Lodbrok Capital LLP, close associate to board member Bale. Check attached info.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Hamilton, Bermuda, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (PLSV) received notification of a trade conducted by a fund managed by Lodbrok Capital LLP, which has ties to board member Joachim Bale. The details of this transaction can be found in the attached document.

news.headline: PVA lauds passage of VETS Safe Travel Act, urges President to sign into law. Dec 20, 2024. By PRNewswire.
news.summary: The Paralyzed Veterans of America is calling on the President to promptly approve the VETS Safe Travel Act after it was passed by Congress on December 20, 2024. Heather Ansley, the Chief Policy Officer of PVA, has emphasized the significance of this bill.

news.headline: Beyond, Inc. sells corporate headquarters, deal finalized.
New laptops offer power and productivity for freelancers. Ensure tech is up-to-date for efficiency.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Mission, Kansas, a press release indicated that individuals like freelancers, creatives, and executives on the move understand the importance of having advanced technology. Having the latest gadgets is crucial in maximizing productivity and efficiency. It is recommended to ensure that you or your loved ones have access to cutting-edge technology to achieve success in today's fast-paced world.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value drops as investors turn cautious on Fed, following Trump's optimism.
Capital Power sold 49% stake in wind facilities in BC and Ontario to Axium Infrastructure.
news.summary: Capital Power Corporation (TSX: CPX) based in Edmonton, Alberta, disclosed the finalization of the sale of a 49% stake in two wind facilities in Canada on December 20, 2024. The Quality Wind facility in British Columbia and the Port Dover and Nanticoke Wind facility in Ontario were sold to Axium Infrastructure. This move marks a significant transaction within the renewable energy sector, with a notable 49% interest being transferred.

news.headline: De Beers Group launches holiday campaign "Forever Present" for A Diamond is Forever, celebrated on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10th, 2024, De Beers Group hosted a holiday celebration at Glasshouse Chelsea in New York City. The event was in honor of their new marketing campaign, 'Forever Present,' presented by A Diamond is Forever. The celebration marked the launch of the campaign and showcased the company's commitment to timeless diamonds.

news.headline: 40 counterparties take $98.356b at the Fed reverse repo operation.
Firan Technology Group acquires FLYHT Aerospace Solutions Ltd as a wholly-owned subsidiary. TSX: FTG, OTCQX: FTGFF.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Toronto, Firan Technology Group Corporation (TSX: FTG) (OTCQX: FTGFF) successfully completed a planned arrangement under the Canada Business Corporations Act. This transaction involved FTG acquiring all existing common shares (known as "FLYHT Shares") of FLYHT Aerospace Solutions Ltd. This acquisition solidifies FLYHT as a fully-owned subsidiary of FTG.

news.headline: Union to strike at Starbucks in LA, Chicago, and Seattle from Friday.
news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest in the last 10 years. The economy has added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was recorded at 5.5%, reflecting a strong and expanding economy. Experts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the upcoming months, leading to further improvements in the overall economic conditions.

news.headline: Belief in young adults unable to afford homes rises by 13% since 2020 in the Pacific Northwest, with 81% agreement in polls by PEMCO. Many cite factors like lack of affordable housing, inflation, and stagnant wages. 38% of current homeowners feel they couldn't buy their home at current prices. 65% of respondents still aspire to own a home one day.
news.summary: A recent poll conducted by PEMCO Mutual Insurance revealed that 81% of Washington and Oregon residents believe that Gen Z and Millennial adults are less likely to own a home compared to previous generations. This sentiment is a significant increase from 2020 when only 68% felt the same way. Factors contributing to this perception include the lack of affordable housing, inflation, and stagnant wages. The poll also found that over a third of current homeowners (38%) would not be able to afford their homes at current market prices. Despite these challenges, 65% of respondents expressed a desire to own a home in the future, showcasing a strong aspiration for homeownership in the Pacific Northwest.

news.headline: Elephant Robotics to showcase cutting-edge robotics and AI bionic robots at CES 2025 in Shenzhen, China.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on December 20, 2024, Elephant Robotics, a leading firm in robotics design and manufacturing, revealed its involvement in the consumer electronics sector amidst the ever-evolving technology landscape. This signals the growing importance of consumer electronics in daily life.

news.headline: National Equipment League starts Season 2 in Kenosha, Wisconsin with 6 competitors and new events. Bryan Furnace returns as defending champ.
news.summary: In Kenosha, Wisconsin on December 20, 2024, the National Equipment League commenced its second season, introducing a novel event and contests alongside six contenders from the construction and heavy equipment operation sectors. Notably, Bryan Furnace, the reigning champion, is among the returning participants.

news.headline: Texas Instruments awarded $1.6 billion for CHIPS Act funding to support new semiconductor wafer fabs in Texas and Utah.
news.summary: In recent developments, a significant achievement was announced as the U.S. Department of Commerce granted TI with a substantial sum of up to $1.6 billion through the CHIPS Act funding. This funding is intended to bolster the construction of three new 300mm semiconductor wafer fabs in Texas and Utah. Additionally, TI anticipates receiving a substantial amount ranging from $6 billion to $8 billion from the U.S. Department of Commerce for further support.

news.headline: OpenAI reveals upgraded reasoning models in competition with Google.
Subaru’s 2025 Solterra Electric SUV priced at $38,495, $6,500 lower than 2024, Touring edition reduced by $7,000.
news.summary: The 2025 Solterra Touring is set to debut with a starting price of $38,495 MSRP, which is $6,500 lower than the 2024 model. Additionally, the Solterra Touring Onyx Edition will be introduced, featuring gloss black wheels, exterior and interior trim accents. This new edition comes with a reduced price of $7,000 compared to the 2024 version. Both models will include the standard Subaru® Symmetrical All-Wheel Drive system.

news.headline: PBF Energy Inc. will take part in Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech & Utilities Conference on January 6-8, 2025.
news.summary: In Parsippany, New Jersey, on December 20, 2024, PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE: PBF) shared plans for its management team to be part of the Goldman Sachs Energy, CleanTech & Utilities Conference from January 6-8, 2025. The company will provide presentation materials for the event.

news.headline: Money laundering charges against Dr. Kingsley R. Chin, former CEO of SpineFrontier Inc., dismissed by Massachusetts federal judge.
news.summary: In a recent development, a federal judge in Massachusetts has dropped the money laundering allegations filed against Dr. Kingsley R. Chin during his tenure as the CEO of SpineFrontier Inc. This decision was made on December 20, 2024. The charges against Dr. Chin have been dismissed, providing a resolution to the case.

news.headline: US Baker Hughes Oil Rig Count Actual 483 (Forecast -, Previous 482)
US Baker Hughes Total Rig Count Actual 589 (Forecast -, Previous 589)
X-Bow gets more funding to expand DoD contract for Hypersonic Solid Rocket Motor Development, in Luling, Texas.
news.summary: X-Bow Systems Inc. has received an additional award of $16 million towards expanding their production capacity for solid rocket motors. This increase comes on top of the $64 million they were granted in 2023 for the same purpose. Based in Luling, Texas, X-Bow is a prominent non-traditional manufacturer specializing in advanced solid rocket motors. The latest development was announced on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: The "agreement" says that House Republicans will raise the debt limit by $1.5T in the "first reconciliation package" alongside $2.5T in "net mandatory spending in the reconciliation process." - Punchbowl Reporter Tweets.
Republican leadership has a slide up that has an agreement on the debt limit - Punchbowl.
Net Health expects growth by 2025 through business wins, collaborations, and client partnerships.
news.summary: In the city of Pittsburgh, on December 20, 2024, Net Health celebrated a successful year marked by business victories, strategic partnerships, and a reaffirmed dedication to their clients. The company, known for its specialized software solutions for restorative care providers, showcased significant growth in collaborations and a focus on client relationships. The year's achievements underscored Net Health's commitment to excellence in serving its industry, highlighting a period of transformation and progress.
